channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Things to know about Elumelu’s UBA successor, Emmanuel Nnorom
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Discover 11 key facts about Emmanuel Nnorom, the seasoned banking executive succeeding Tony Elumelu as UBA Group Chairman on August 21, 2026.

item.title: Bayelsa denies shifting blame to Tinubu over state’s poverty rate
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Bayelsa State Government refutes claims it blamed President Tinubu’s administration for the state’s poverty rate, calling reports false and misleading.

item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Silverstone's British Grand Prix 2026 was an immense event, and it could have been truly epic without a regulation which I have been complaining about for years.

item.title: Customs exceeded 2025 revenue target despite waivers – CG
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description: The Nigeria Customs Service on Monday said it surpassed its 2025 revenue target by 10.24 per cent, generating ₦7.28tn between January and December, despite a series of government-approved tax waivers and fiscal incentives aimed at stimulating economic growth. The Comptroller-General of Customs, Adew

item.title: Cusack's coach told FA she was 'generally a liar', inquest hears
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: The coach of former Sheffield United player Maddy Cusack called her a liar in an account to the Football Association after her death, an inquest has heard.

item.title: Sam Larry alive, responding to treatment after fatal auto crash, says associate
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description: Akin Abolade, aka Mr Lilgaga, an associate of popular socialite Samson Eletu, popularly known as Sam Larry, has debunked the rumour that the socialite, who was recently involved in an auto crash, is dead. Abolade made this disclosure while speaking with PUNCH Online via Instagram on Monday. Accordin

item.title: World Cup: Mexico coach Aguirre ‘proud but hurt’ after England defeat
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Mexico head coach Javier Aguirre says he is proud of his players despite admitting he was deeply hurt after their 3-2 defeat to England ended their 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign. The post World Cup: Mexico coach Aguirre ‘proud but hurt’ after England defeat appeared first on Vanguard News

Collins Egbetanah, representing Udu Constituency, vacant following his defection from the All Progressives Congress (APC) to the NDC. In a state

item.description: United Bank for Africa (UBA) Plc has announced that its Group Chairman, Tony O. Elumelu, will retire from the Board of Directors on August 21, 2026, after completing the 12-year tenure limit for non-executive directors prescribed by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN). item.title: Belgium Fumes After FIFA Clears Balogun Following Trump Call
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: FIFA's decision to overturn US striker Folarin Balogun's World Cup suspension — after an intervention from Donald Trump — has caused fury in Belgium. Max Ramsay explains why the reversal is overshadowing their crucial match against Team USA. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: James McGinniss on Battery Solutions For Energy Prices
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: During a severe heat wave in New York City, power prices have surged to historic levels. James McGinnis, CEO and co-founder of David Energy, explained that while demand strains the grid annually, new technologies are helping to mitigate the impact. He spoke on July 3, 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.description: Article URL: https://www.theargumentmag.com/p/should-dayquil-be-legal Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48806289 Points: 17 # Comments: 6

item.title: Police Allegedly Arrest Father Of PFIPC Forgery Suspect, Adeniyi
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The controversy surrounding the alleged Presidential Fiscal and Infrastructure Projects Council (PFIPC) deepened on Monday following reports that police operatives arrested the father of Prince Adeyemi Adeniyi, the central figure in the ongoing forgery investigation linked to the purported council.

item.title: England Star Out Of World Cup After Suffering Serious Injury
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: England have been dealt a major setback at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with midfielder Jordan Henderson ruled out of the remainder of the tournament after suffering a serious injury that will require surgery. The 36-year-old sustained the injury in bizarre fashion following England’s dramatic 3–2 victo

item.title: MTN Group CEO Ralph Mupita becomes founding commissioner of AI for Good Global Commission

item.description: MTN Group President and CEO Ralph Mupita has been appointed as a founding commissioner on the AI for…

item.title: Benue APC crisis: Tinubu meets Alia, Suswam in Aso Villa
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Johnbosco Agbakwuru ABUJA — President Bola Tinubu is currently meeting behind closed doors with Benue State Governor Rev. Fr. Hyacinth Alia and former governor Senator Gabriel Suswam at the Presidential Villa, Abuja, amid a crisis over the Benue Central All Progressives Congress (APC) senatorial

item.title: World Cup 2026: Adidas unveils official match ball for semifinals, final
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: With less than two weeks remaining until the conclusion of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, adidas has unveiled the official match ball that will be used for the tournament's final four matches. The post World Cup 2026: Adidas unveils official match ball for semifinals, final appeared first on Vanguard News

item.title: Jigawa Police Arraign 24 Traffic Offenders Over Vehicle Registration Violations
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Jigawa State Police Command has arraigned 24 motorists for violating vehicle registration and traffic regulations as it intensified enforcement of laws aimed at improving public safety and strengthening security across the state. The command disclosed this in a statement issued on Monday by its

item.title: UN discusses prevention of genocide: Six times it failed to do just that
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The UN General Assembly meets amid Israel's genocide on Gaza, Myanmar's genocide against the Rohingya, and other crises.

item.title: Oyo govt, firm begin distribution of 30,000 bags of rice to vulnerable residents
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Oyo State Government, in partnership with a multinational company, on Monday commenced the distribution of 30,000 bags of rice to The post Oyo govt, firm begin distribution of 30,000 bags of rice to vulnerable residents appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Ancelotti Chose Bruno to Take Penalty – Vinicius Jr
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Brazil forward Vinicius Jr has dismissed suggestions that he gave up a penalty in pursuit of individual accolades, insisting that head coach Carlo Ancelotti had already decided Bruno would take the spot-kick. The Real Madrid winger made the clarification in comments shared by football journalist Fab

item.title: Peter Obi lacks qualities to lead Nigeria — Segalink
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Human rights activist and social commentator, Segun Awosanya, popularly known as Segalink, has faulted the presidential ambition.... The post Peter Obi lacks qualities to lead Nigeria — Segalink appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Seven managers lose jobs after elimination [FULL LIST]
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Ghana coach, Carlos Queiroz, has become the seventh and latest manager to lose his job following the the Black Stars’ Round of 32 exit at the FIFA World Cup 2026. Queiroz stepped down as Ghana head coach after three months in charge of the national football team. Recall that Ghana failed to qu
